ticket_panel.title: Ticket System
ticket_panel.description:
**Welcome to our Ticket!**

Select a ticket type from the dropdown menu below to get started. Our team will assist you as soon as possible.

**Available Options:**
 **Buy** - Purchase our Tool
 **Support** - Get Help With Any Issue
 **Reseller** - Reseller applications
 **Join Team** - Team applications
 **And More** - Check DropDown Ticket Menu
